basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Technical Support III Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AIIMS Delhi website. The last date to submit the application form is 15-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years graduate in relevant subject / field + three years' experience after graduation or PG in relevant subject / field, Research experience in field of emergency care
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Essential: Three years graduate in relevant subject / field + three years' experience after graduation or PG in relevant subject / field. Desirable: Research experience in field of emergency care experience will be given priority.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment is 15-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support III post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field with three years of experience after graduation or a PG degree in a relevant subject/field. Research experience in emergency care is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support III post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 28,000 + 30% HRA Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official AIIMS Delhi website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job, as indicated by the 'Job Type' in the overview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
